intent: Model a customer who remains one or two unplanned debits away from account stress.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should emphasize low remaining liquidity and heightened risk from small shocks.
customerProfileSummary: Rent-heavy profile with minimal remaining checking buffer after essentials.
whatToLookFor: High cash-pressure score and fragility from modest additional debit activity.
realWorldPattern: Rent-heavy budget with little post-bill checking buffer.
sanitizedNotice: Synthetic profile only; no real account balances or personal details.
